name: GOOD GAMING, INC.
business: The company focuses on pre-installing mobile games on devices through a partnership with ViaOne Services, targeting telecom customer bases. It has exited blockchain, Minecraft, and Roblox.
sellsTo: Assist Wireless and enTouch Wireless customers

exposures.sentence: We are at an early stage of our new business operations focusing on pre-installing games on mobile devices through our partnership with ViaOne Services.
